curation_notes: Patch commit 400c226 adds a _is_path() helper and a check in HTTPDatasetSource.load() to reject filenames containing path separators from the Content-Disposition header. Only one non-test source file (mlflow/data/http_dataset_source.py) was modified. Location derived directly from the patch diff — the vulnerable code is in the load() method where the basename variable is used without path traversal validation.
